lessons.title: Present simple, present continuous, stative verbs
lessons.description: Learn how to use the present simple, present continuous, and stative verbs.

lessons.title: Past simple, past continuous, used to
lessons.description: Learn how to use the past simple, past continuous, and used to for past actions, situations, habits, and states.

lessons.title: Fun and Games
lessons.description: Vocabulary for talking about games, sport, music and free-time activities.

lessons.title: Units 1-3 Review
lessons.description: A cumulative test covering the vocabulary and grammar from Units 1, 2 and 3.

lessons.title: Present perfect simple, present perfect continuous
lessons.description: Learn how to use the present perfect simple and present perfect continuous to describe past actions connected to the present.

lessons.title: Past perfect simple, past perfect continuous
lessons.description: Learn how to use the past perfect simple and past perfect continuous to describe actions and situations that happened before another point in the past.

lessons.title: Learning and doing
lessons.description: Vocabulary for talking about studying, exams, skills and school life.

lessons.title: Units 4-6 Review
lessons.description: A cumulative test covering the vocabulary and grammar from Units 4, 5 and 6.

lessons.title: Present continuous, will, be going to, present simple
lessons.description: Learn how to use the present continuous, will, be going to, and present simple to talk about future time.

lessons.title: In, on, at
lessons.description: Learn how to use the prepositions in, on and at for time and place.

lessons.title: Coming and Going
lessons.description: Vocabulary for talking about travel, transport and journeys.
